notes: Adidas running shoes sale scraper via Firecrawl raw HTML + Cheerio parse. Scrapes womens and mens sale running pages with pagination using ?start=48, capped at 2 pages per base for Vercel stability. Extracts listingName directly from tile title/image alt, preserves listingName exactly, sets model equal to listingName for downstream merge normalization, parses gender from tile subtitle, and keeps shoeType as unknown for downstream processing. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Dedupe by listingURL. Writes to adidas.json.

Allbirds sale running shoes scraper using direct HTML fetch on mens + womens filtered sale pages. Brand is forced to Allbirds. listingName is taken directly from data-product-name. Gender is parsed from listingName: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown. Model is listingName with the leading gender removed. shoeType is trail if listingName contains trail, track if it contains track/spike/spikes, otherwise road because the collection pages are already filtered to Running Shoes. Uses product card link, image, and compare-at price data from the returned HTML. Writes to allbirds-sale.json.
no notes

ASICS combined running clearance page via Firecrawl + Cheerio. Follows Load More pagination using page URLs, reads total-hit-count for completeness, extracts model from [data-test='product-name'], and derives gender/shoeType from [data-test='product-classification']. Gender defaults to unisex when mens/womens is not shown. shoeType: trail for 'trail running shoes', track for 'track & field shoes', road for 'running shoes'. Writes to asics-sale.json.
Backcountry running shoes sale page via Firecrawl. Excludes cards without an original (strikethrough) price. Supports current-price ranges. Writes to backcountry.json.

Big Shoes running sale shoes via Findify JSON API. Uses one direct request to the smart-collection endpoint with activity=Running and multiple_product_type=Shoes. Mens only, so gender is forced to mens. shoeType is forced to unknown. Writes to bigshoes.json.
Big Peach Running Co deals footwear page via Firecrawl. Handles multiple pages automatically by detecting pagination. Gender inferred from product name. Writes to big-peach-running-co.json.
no notes

Champs Sports running shoes sale scraper using direct HTML fetch + Cheerio on the sale running shoes page. Parses product cards from returned HTML, preserving listingName exactly as scraped, deriving brand/model from listingName, parsing gender from the tile secondary line, and forcing shoeType to unknown unless strict trail/track keywords appear in the listing name. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Dedupe by listingURL. Metadata includes dropCounts, droppedDealsSample, and pageSummaries. Writes to champs-sale.json.

DSW clearance running shoes scraper via Firecrawl raw HTML + Cheerio parse. Scrapes the combined mens+womens clearance running page and paginates with DSW page params No=2, No=3, No=4 rather than item offsets. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, derives brand/model from listingName, parses gender from listingName: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown, and forces shoeType to unknown for all deals. Pricing rule: if one visible price is present, sets salePrice only; if two visible prices are present, uses the first/lower as salePrice and the second/higher as originalPrice. Skips hidden-price tiles such as See Price in Cart / See Price in Bag / Add to Bag to See Price. Dedupe by listingURL. Metadata includes dropCounts, dropReasons, genderCounts, and pageSummaries. Writes to dsw-firecrawl.json.

Famous Footwear running shoes scraper via Coveo Commerce API. Mens + womens only, running shoes category only. Skips MAP / See Price in Cart items and keeps only true sale items where salePrice < originalPrice. Gender is parsed from API webgenders, then falls back to listingName: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown. shoeType forced to unknown. Writes to famous-footwear.json.

Finish Line running shoes sale page via Firecrawl. Scrapes ONE page only (no pagination). Skips 'See price in bag' items and counts skips. imageURL uses media.finishline.com img/srcset fallback, then data-sku fallback. Writes to finishline.json.
Per-store Cheerio blob (env: FLEET_FEET_CHEERIO_BLOB_URL).
no notes
Shopify products.json collection scraper (mens + womens sale)

Going, Going, Gone sale running shoes scraper via DSG catalog product API. Scrapes mens + womens sale running athletic & sneakers pages through the direct search API. Uses parent productDetails pricing for honest range support when available; otherwise falls back to active floatFacets exact pricing. Keeps only deals with both sale and original pricing where sale is less than original. Gender is parsed from attributes first, then title, else unknown. shoeType is parsed from attribute 5066 first (Road/Trail/Track), then strict title fallback: road only for 'road running', trail only for 'trail running', track for 'track' or 'spike/spikes', else unknown. Writes to going-going-gone.json.

Hibbett sale running shoes scraper via Firecrawl raw HTML + Cheerio parse. Scrapes mens and womens sale running pages. Reads results count and conditionally paginates with start/sz only when the root page does not already contain the full result set returned by Firecrawl. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, parses brand from tile GTM data with listingName fallback, derives model from listingName, parses gender from tile GTM data with listingName fallback, and forces shoeType to unknown for all deals. Skips See Price In Bag / See Price In Cart items. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Dedupe by listingURL. Metadata includes dropCounts, droppedDealsSample, and pageSummaries. Writes to hibbett-sale.json.
HOKA sale shoes page. Fetched via Firecrawl (waitFor:3000 for JS rendering). Writes to hoka.json via HOKA_DEALS_BLOB_URL / BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN.
Holabird is combined into a single blob (road + trail, mens/womens/unisex).
JD Sports running shoes sale via Algolia product search API (jd_products_prod index). Much faster than HTML scraping. Filters facet_activity=Running and facet_category=Shoes. Writes to jdsports.json.
Journeys running shoes sale pages (womens + mens). One deal per product card. shoeType forced to unknown. Writes to journeys.json.

Karhu sale running shoes scraper using direct HTML fetch + Cheerio parse. Scrapes filtered mens and womens shoe sale searches. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Sets shoeType to unknown for all deals. Metadata includes dropCounts, droppedDealsSample, and pageSummaries. Writes to karhu-sale.json.
Kohl's running shoes Sale + Clearance via Firecrawl. Extracts canonical fields including imageURL, supports price ranges (sale/original) and discountPercentUpTo. Writes to xxx/kohls.json.
Per-store Cheerio blob (env: LUKES_LOCKER_CHEERIO_BLOB_URL).

Macy's sale running shoes scraper via Firecrawl raw HTML + Cheerio parse. Scrapes mens and womens featured running sale pages. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, parses brand from tile brand text, derives model from listingName, parses gender from listingName: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown, and maps shoeType from listingName: trail -> trail, track/spike/spikes -> track, running -> road, else unknown. Handles both pricing patterns where the visible sale price includes 'Now' and where the sale price appears without 'Now'. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Dedupe by listingURL. Metadata includes dropCounts, droppedDealsSample, and pageSummaries. Writes to macys-sale.json.
Per-store Cheerio blob (env: MARATHON_SPORTS_CHEERIO_BLOB_URL).
Mizuno USA running sale pages (mens + womens). Writes to mizuno.json via APIFY + Vercel Blob.

New Balance sale running shoes scraper via Apify Playwright + Camoufox. Scrapes mens and womens sale running pages. Uses residential proxies to bypass Akamai bot protection. Extracts pricing from visible sale/strike-through price elements with swatch JSON fallback. Keeps only true sale items where salePrice < originalPrice. Gender parsed from category-name tile text. shoeType forced to unknown. Writes to newbalance-sale.json.

Newton Running Web Specials scraper using direct HTML fetch + Cheerio on https://www.newtonrunning.com/collections/web-specials-v2. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, forces brand to Newton, derives model by removing a leading Men's/Women's/Unisex prefix from listingName, parses gender from listingName and tile bullets, and forces shoeType to unknown for all deals. Skips hidden-price tiles such as See Price in Cart / Add to Bag to See Price / See Price in Bag. Tracks dropCounts, pageSummaries, and gender counts in top-level metadata. Dedupe by listingURL + visible pricing. Writes to newton-specials.json.

Nike sale running shoes page via Firecrawl. Uses scroll actions to load more tiles (infinite scroll). Drops 'See Price in Bag' items and counts drops. ShoeType inferred from title keywords: road/trail/track; gender inferred from title: Women's/Men's/Unisex else unknown. Writes to nike.json.

On last-season/classics running shoes scraper via Algolia product search API. Uses the US_products_production_v3 index with filters for discounted visible shoes on the classics page across competition, marathon, road running, track and field, and trail running. Preserves listingName exactly from Algolia name, forces brand to On, sets model equal to listingName, maps gender only to mens/womens/unisex/unknown from the Algolia gender field, and maps shoeType from productSubtype/productSubtypes: road_running -> road, trail_running -> trail, track or track_and_field -> track, else unknown. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Dedupe by listingURL. Writes to on-last-season-shoes.json.

Public Lands sale running shoes scraper via Firecrawl REST raw HTML. Scrapes womens + mens filtered sale running pages, follows pageNumber pagination, capped at 5 pages per source for stability. Splits tiles from product-title-link anchors, preserves listingName exactly as scraped, parses brand/model from listingName, parses gender from listingName: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown, and forces shoeType to unknown for all deals. Supports exact prices and honest range pricing via salePrice/originalPrice or range fields plus discountPercentUpTo. Skips See Price in Cart / See Price in Bag items. Dedupe by listingURL. Metadata includes dealsByGender and droppedByReason for seePriceInCart and duplicateAfterMerge. Writes to publiclands-sale.json.

PUMA US running shoes sale page via Apify Playwright (infinite scroll). Extracts h2 model, h3 subtitle, sale-price + price data-test-id values. Writes to puma.json via PUMA_DEALS_BLOB_URL / BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN.

Shopify collection products.json scraper for womens-sale-shoes, mens-sale-shoes, and sale-super-shoes. Dedupe by listingURL across collections. Stops on HTTP failure, empty products array, or 2 consecutive non-empty pages with no new unique products. Counts pages with products only. Writes to pro.json. Gender parsed from title; shoeType forced to unknown.
Uses REI JSON endpoint via Playwright to bypass 403 and paginate deals
no notes
no notes

Shopify section_id product grid scraper (UI pagination). Collects product URLs from the grid and fetches /products/<handle>.json for pricing. Gender inferred from title, shoeType forced to unknown. Writes to runnersplus.json.

Running Center uses the products-search API with categoryId 18334 (Men's Shoes) and 18342 (Women's Shoes). Keeps only true sale items where salePrice and originalPrice both exist and salePrice < originalPrice. Requires products to be shippable by excluding in-store-purchase-only items. Gender is parsed from the product name. shoeType is forced to unknown. Writes to running-center.json.
Per-store Cheerio blob (env: RUNNING_WAREHOUSE_CHEERIO_BLOB_URL).

The Running Well Store sale footwear scraper via Shopify collection products.json API. Scrapes /collections/all-footwear?sale=true and paginates products.json pages until empty. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, parses brand from vendor with title fallback, derives model from listingName, parses gender from title/product_type/tags as mens, womens, unisex, else unknown, and keeps shoeType unknown unless tags/product_type explicitly indicate road, trail, or track. Skips hidden-price items such as See Price in Cart / See Price in Bag / Add to Bag to See Price. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice; equal price and compare-at price are dropped as notOnSale. Dedupe by listingURL + visible pricing. Response includes pageSummaries, dropCounts, and mens/womens/unisex/unknown totals, while the saved blob contains top-level metadata plus deals. Writes to therunningwellstore.json.

Pacers Running sale shoes scraper for https://runpacers.com/collections/sale-all. Follows collection pagination with ?page=2, ?page=3, etc. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, parses gender only as mens, womens, unisex, else unknown, and forces shoeType to unknown for all deals. Skips hidden-price tiles such as See Price in Cart / Add to Bag to See Price / See Price in Bag. Tracks dropped reasons, page summaries, and gender counts in top-level metadata. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Writes to the blob URL from RUNPACERS_DEALS_BLOB_URL.
Searchanise (searchserverapi*/getresults) direct JSON/JSONP pagination. Drops all out-of-stock. shoeType forced per source URL: road/trail/track.

Saucony running sale scraper using direct HTML fetch + Cheerio on https://www.saucony.com/en/sale-running/. Reads server-rendered product tiles, preserves listingName exactly as scraped, forces brand to Saucony, and derives model by removing a leading Men's/Women's/Unisex prefix from listingName. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Gender is parsed from listingName: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown. shoeType is derived from data-product-attributes surface: trail -> trail; fieldTrack/track/spike/spikes -> track; road or treadmill -> road; otherwise unknown. Supports Load More pagination through button.load-more-cta[data-grid-url] when present. Writes to saucony-sale.json.
no notes

Shoe Carnival running shoes sale scraper via Algolia product search API. Scrapes womens and mens running shoes sale category pages filtered to assignedCategories.id 193 (womens running shoes) and 194 (mens running shoes), with facet filters on_sale:true and styleType:Performance. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, derives brand/model from the hit data, parses gender from the Algolia gender field with listingName fallback, and forces shoeType to unknown. Skips hidden-price items such as See Price in Cart / See Price in Bag / MAP-restricted products. Dedupe is done by masterStyle with a special rule: keep the lowest-sale-price colorway plus one additional higher-price colorway when available. Writes to shoe-carnival.json.

Sierra clearance running shoes scraper via Firecrawl raw HTML + Cheerio parse. Scrapes the running clearance listing pages and detects pagination from the listing page. Current observed run fetched 3 pages from the running clearance path. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped from the tile, parses brand from tile data-brand/brand link, derives model from listingName by removing a leading brand and trailing gender parenthetical, parses gender from tile title/department text: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown, and maps shoeType from tile text: trail -> trail, track/spike/spikes -> track, running -> road, else unknown. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Dedupe by listingURL. Metadata includes dropCounts, droppedDealsSample, and pageSummaries. Writes to sierra.json.

Skechers running sale scraper using direct HTML fetch + Cheerio on the running-filtered sale page. Treats the infinite-load page as offset pagination using start=0,12,24... with sz=12. Reads product-V2 tiles, preserves listingName exactly as scraped, forces brand to Skechers, and keeps shoeType as unknown for all deals. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Gender is parsed from the tile gender label: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown. Special model rule: if listingName begins with 'Skechers Slip-ins:' that prefix is removed before model parsing so merge-deals can normalize GO RUN models better. Writes to skechers-sale.json.

Sports Basement running shoe deals scraper using Algolia search API plus Vercel blob write. Queries the running deals search results for q=shoes deals with named_tags.Activity=Running. Paginates through Algolia hitsPerPage batches and writes sportsbasement.json. listingName comes from hit.title. brand comes from vendor. model is listingName with leading brand removed. listingURL is built from product handle. imageURL comes from image or product_image. Gender is inferred from named_tags, tags, handle, and title. shoeType is trail for trail, track for spike/track, road for road, else unknown. Hidden-price tiles like see price in cart or bag are skipped. Includes top-level pageSummaries, dropCounts, droppedReasons, and mens/womens/unisex/unknown totals.

Topo Athletic sale running shoes scraper using the NetSuite items API endpoint (api/cacheable/items). Scrapes womens and mens sale running pages using c=3583691 with commercecategoryurl separation. listingName is preserved exactly from displayname and model is set equal to listingName. Brand is forced to Topo Athletic. Gender is parsed from the API gender field (mens/womens/unisex else unknown). shoeType is derived from collection/bestfor text: trail -> trail, road -> road, track/spike -> track, otherwise unknown. Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Supports pricing fallback from matrixchilditems_detail if needed. Dedupe by listingURL. Metadata includes dropCounts, droppedDealsSample, and pageSummaries. Writes to topoathletic-sale.json.
Track Shack clearance running shoes. Writes to trackshack.json via Cheerio scraper.

Tradehome sale running shoes scraper via Algolia product search API. Scrapes the sale collection and paginates through all result pages. Keeps only adult mens, womens, or unisex performance running shoes using strong running signals such as performance-running-shoes, mens-running-shoes, womens-running-shoes, all-running-shoes, and Running tags. Drops kids, accessories, boots, casual/lifestyle, and other non-running sale items with detailed dropCounts and pageSummaries. Skips hidden-price tiles. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, parses brand from vendor, derives model from listingName, parses gender from meta.custom.product_category / collections / tags / title, and forces shoeType to unknown Keeps only true sale items with both salePrice and originalPrice where salePrice < originalPrice. Dedupe by product id / handle. Writes to tradehome-sale.json.

TYR running footwear sale scraper via Shopify collection products.json API. Scrapes the footwear-runners collection and paginates products.json pages until empty. Keeps only true sale items where salePrice < originalPrice. Preserves listingName exactly as scraped, normalizes brand from vendor to TYR, derives model from listingName, parses gender from title/tags, and keeps shoeType unknown unless product_type or tags explicitly define road, trail, or track. Range fields stay null unless there is a real range. Skips hidden-price items. Response includes dropCounts and pageSummaries, while the saved blob contains top-level metadata plus deals only. Writes to tyr-runners-sale.json.

Under Armour outlet running shoes scraper using direct HTML fetch on mens + womens outlet running pages. Brand is forced to Under Armour. Gender is parsed from each tile subtitle: mens, womens, unisex, else unknown. shoeType is parsed from tile subtitle: trail if it contains trail, track if it contains track or spike, road if it contains running, else unknown. Follows next-page links. Writes to underarmour-outlet.json.
no notes
